mnemonics.title: SRL Process Steps
mnemonics.content: Identify Predicate (IP) → Locate Arguments (LA) → Assign Roles (AR) → Validate Structure (VS) → IP-LA-AR-VS

acronyms.usage: Core NLP task for extracting predicate-argument structures

visualTips.visualization: Highlight spans with colored brackets under sentences, different colors for different roles

analogies.analogy: Like theater roles: Predicate=play, Agent=actor, Patient=prop, Location=stage
